title: Warm Gooey Croatian Mars Bar Bake
description: A kid-friendly Croatian dessert featuring Mars bars, nuts, and a sweet gooey sauce, cooked to perfection in a fondue pot. This Jain-friendly treat is perfect for a sweet tooth.
instructions: Preheat the fondue pot to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, brown sugar, and sea salt.
Add the melted butter, heavy cream, and vanilla extract to the bowl and stir until combined.
Add the chopped hazelnuts and Mars bars to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the sugar mixture.
Pour the mixture into the preheated fondue pot and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reduce the heat to 250 degrees Fahrenheit and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Remove the fondue pot from the heat and let it cool for 2 minutes.
Serve the warm gooey Croatian Mars bar bake in small cups or bowls and enjoy.
Garnish with additional chopped hazelnuts and Mars bars, if desired.
